lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this strange fountain?

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: This is the Ectofuntus, the most marvellous creation of Necrovarus, our glorious leader.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the Ectofuntus for?

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: It provides the power to keep us ghosts from passing over into the next plane of existence.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And how does it work?

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: You have to pour a bucket of ectoplasm into the fountain, a pot of ground bones, and then worship at the Ectofuntus. A unit of unholy power will then be created.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you do it yourself?

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: No, we must rely upon the living, as the worship of the undead no longer holds any inherent power.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why would people waste their time helping you out?

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: For every unit of power produced we will give you five Ectotokens. These tokens can be used in Port Phasmatys to purchase various services, not least of which includes access through the main toll gates.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where do I get ectoplasm from?

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: Necrovarus sensed the power bubbling beneath our feet, and we delved long and deep beneath Port Phasmatys, until we found a pool of natural ectoplasm. You may find it by using the trapdoor over there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I grind bones?

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: There is a bone grinding machine upstairs. Put bones of any type into the machine's hopper, and then turn the handle to grind them. You will need a pot to empty the machine of ground up bones.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I receive Ectotokens?

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: We disciples keep track of how many units of power have been produced. Just talk to us once you have generated some and we will reimburse you with the correct amount of Ectotokens.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I generate units of power?

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: You have to pour a bucket of ectoplasm into the fountain and then worship at the Ectofuntus with a pot of ground bones. This will create a unit of unholy power.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for your time.

sections.title: After completing the hard Morytania Diary

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have another bonecrusher, please?

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: Compliments of Morytania for your efforts throughout the tasks set.

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: You already appear to own such a device, mortal.

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: Woooo wooo wooooo woooo

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have the tokens I have earned?

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: I have [number] ectotokens waiting for you mortal, but you do not have room in your inventory for them.

lines.speaker: Ghost disciple
lines.text: Certainly, mortal. Here's [number] ectotokens.
